title: Rackspace India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rackspace India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
